suppress.notes: file name: quarkus-update-recipes-1.0.19.jar sev: HIGH reason: False positive. Reference only

False positive. CVE-2026-42582 is for io.netty:netty-codec-http3 (QPACK literal unbounded allocation in HTTP/3 header decoding). The core Netty 4.1.x modules (netty-buffer, netty-codec, netty-handler, etc.) do not include HTTP/3 support. Added: 2026-05-20
